use_codes.desc: USE OF PRAVASTATIN SODIUM FOR SECONDARY PREVENTION OF CORONARY EVENTS IN MEN AND WOMEN WHO HAVE HAD A MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION AND HAVE NORMAL CHOLESTEROL LEVELS

indications.text:
PRAVIGARD
PRAVIGARD (Buffered Aspirin and Pravastatin Sodium) is indicated in patients for whom treatment with
both PRAVACHOL and buffered aspirin is appropriate. As described in the labeling for PRAVACHOL
and buffered aspirin below, the components of PRAVIGARD are both indicated to reduce the occur...
